scripts.format: prettier --write eslint.config.mjs playwright.config.mjs vitest.config.mjs tests/browser tests/frontend
scripts.format:check: prettier --check eslint.config.mjs playwright.config.mjs vitest.config.mjs tests/browser tests/frontend
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run test:unit
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run test:browser
